tool.name: discord_search_messages
tool.description: Search for messages in a Discord server. Uses Discord's built-in search to find messages by content, author, or other filters.

parameters.name: server_url
parameters.description: Any channel URL in the Discord server (e.g. 'https://discord.com/channels/123/456')

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query (supports Discord search syntax: from:user, has:link, before:date, etc.)
